title: Clouds Backport
description: Backports the new Cloud Textures from 1.21.6 (25w21a) to Older Versions!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e18ddc6da3a0b152dda50595e15beb793689570.png)

☁️ Backports the **new Clouds Texture** introduced in 1.21.6 (Snapshot 25w21a) to Older Versions

🪶 **Lightweight** and **Vanilla Friendly**!

⚠️ **NOTE** : If the Resource Pack says **"Invalid, only for Newer/Older Version!"** , it should still work as intended!

Example Screenshot :

![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c6540484c53889ed35fc780beeb0c55a316365e.png)
_The Clouds are stretched :O_ - (Captured and Tested in 1.21.4)
